rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §33.908, which governs school district meal card grace period policies. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district that allows students to use a prepaid meal card or account to purchase meals served at schools in the district shall adopt a grace period policy regarding the use of the cards or accounts.
_note: No conflict; provisions address entirely distinct subject matters.
